parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_locks (workflow_name, locked_by, expires_at)
VALUES ('WF5-INGEST', '{{ $executionId }}', NOW() + INTERVAL '10 minutes')
ON CONFLICT (workflow_name)
DO UPDATE SET locked_at = NOW(), locked_by = '{{ $executionId }}', expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '10 minutes'
WHERE workflow_locks.expires_at < NOW()
RETURNING workflow_name;
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'email_last_history_id';

nodes.name: Gmail: List Messages
nodes.notes: REQUIRES MANUAL SETUP: Gmail OAuth2 credential must be configured in n8n UI

nodes.name: Gmail: Get Message
nodes.notes: REQUIRES MANUAL SETUP: Gmail OAuth2 credential

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO emails (
    gmail_message_id, gmail_thread_id, subject,
    from_email, from_name, to_email, reply_to, date,
    snippet, body_plain, body_html, body_stripped,
    has_attachments, attachment_types, has_ics_attachment,
    is_reply, in_reply_to, references_header,
    gmail_labels, gmail_internal_date,
    detected_language, language_confidence,
    status
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.gmail_message_id }}',
    '{{ $json.gmail_thread_id }}',
    $1,
    '{{ $json.from_email }}',
    $2,
    '{{ $json.to_email }}',
    '{{ $json.reply_to }}',
    '{{ $json.date }}'::timestamptz,
    $3,
    $4, $5, $6,
    {{ $json.has_attachments }},
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.attachment_types) }}'::jsonb,
    {{ $json.has_ics_attachment }},
    {{ $json.is_reply }},
    '{{ $json.in_reply_to }}',
    '{{ $json.references_header }}',
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.gmail_labels) }}'::jsonb,
    {{ $json.gmail_internal_date ? "'" + $json.gmail_internal_date + "'::timestamptz" : 'NULL' }},
    '{{ $json.detected_language }}',
    {{ $json.language_confidence }},
    'ingested'
)
ON CONFLICT (gmail_message_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO email_threads (gmail_thread_id, subject, last_received_at, last_activity_at)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Parse Email Message').item.json.gmail_thread_id }}',
    '{{ $('Parse Email Message').item.json.subject.substring(0, 1000).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (gmail_thread_id) DO UPDATE
    SET message_count = email_threads.message_count + 1,
        last_received_at = NOW(),
        last_activity_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO email_processing_log (email_id, workflow_name, step, status, details)
SELECT id, 'WF5-INGEST', 'ingestion', 'completed',
    json_build_object('from', '{{ $('Parse Email Message').item.json.from_email }}', 'subject', '{{ $('Parse Email Message').item.json.subject.substring(0, 200).replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
FROM emails WHERE gmail_message_id = '{{ $('Parse Email Message').item.json.gmail_message_id }}';

INSERT INTO emails (
    gmail_message_id, gmail_thread_id, subject,
    from_email, from_name, to_email, date,
    snippet, detected_language, language_confidence,
    status
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.gmail_message_id }}',
    '{{ $json.gmail_thread_id }}',
    '{{ $json.subject.substring(0, 1000).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.from_email }}',
    '{{ ($json.from_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.to_email }}',
    '{{ $json.date }}'::timestamptz,
    '{{ ($json.snippet || "").substring(0, 500).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.detected_language }}',
    {{ $json.language_confidence }},
    'skipped'
)
ON CONFLICT (gmail_message_id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO email_processing_log (workflow_name, step, status, details)
VALUES ('WF5-INGEST', 'skipped', 'skipped', '{"reason": "lock not acquired"}'::jsonb);
